snapshot.description: Remove all ClinicalRepository and direct cloud_firestore dependencies from the Receptionist Presentation layer. Replace with BlocBuilder/BlocListener patterns consuming AppointmentCubit. Affects 7 files across screens and widgets.
snapshot.title: Refactor Receptionist UI to Clean Architecture

newValue.text: Replace direct Firestore calls with Cubit patterns

changes.newValue: Completed migration of Receptionist UI to Clean Architecture. All 7 presentation files (screens and widgets) are now consuming PatientCubit and AppointmentCubit instead of direct repositories or Firestore.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Replace direct Firestore calls with Cubit patterns
